name: losoma
description: Static LOSOMA website for Hostinger production with Vercel staging.

scripts.build:images: npm run assets:images && npm run build:static
scripts.dev: npm run build:static && npx wrangler pages dev dist --live-reload
scripts.dev:images: npm run build:images && npx wrangler pages dev dist --live-reload
scripts.deploy: npm run build && node -e "console.error('Production deploy is Hostinger-only. Follow DEPLOYMENT_CHECKLIST.md.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.deploy:preview: npm run build && node -e "console.error('Cloudflare Pages preview deploy is disabled. Use Vercel staging only when explicitly requested.'); process.exit(1)"
